form.formComment: Two back was beaten by 10 m finishing third behind Patnwill at Kilmore over 1690m in a NR up to 39 on March 26 at $10. Then a handy effort when beaten by 4.5 m finishing second after a quick start, behind Jilliby Topgun at Echuca over 1755m in a NR up to 42 on April 5 at $16. Draws the inside and can break through.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Gave ground and tired over the concluding stages of the race to be beaten 67m.
Commenced to tire leaving the 600m mark to be beaten 46.5m.

form.formComment: Didn't do much at the last run, 8th (Fr1) over 1690m after showing early speed at Kilmore beaten 35 m by Patnwill (2:11.40) in NR up to 39 on March 26 at $17.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Didn't do much at the last run, 8th (Fr1) over 1690m after showing early speed at Kilmore beaten 35 m by Patnwill (2:11.40) in NR up to 39 on March 26 at $17.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Sulky contacted by Massif Central rounding the final turn.
Weakened inside the final 600m to be beaten 54m.
Hung in under pressure nearing the finish.
Held up for a clear run until approaching 200m before using the sprint lane.

form.formComment: Backs up three days after he failed to impress 5th (Fr1) over 1755m at Echuca, beaten 17 m by Jilliby Topgun (2:12.40) in NR up to 42 on April 5 at $61. Before that 7th (Fr2) over 1690m at Kilmore beaten 30 m by Patnwill (2:11.40) in NR up to 39 on March 26 at $51. Could show more.

form.formComment: Resumed when beaten 8 m fourth behind Playa Del Carmen at Maryborough over 1690m in a NR up to 36 on March 30. Draws well and could improve enough to take this out.

form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into sixth after a quick start, behind Always Skye High at this track over 2150m in a NR up to 37 on March 18 at $5. Then a handy effort when a close second behind Playa Del Carmen at Maryborough over 1690m in a NR up to 36 on March 30 at $15. With further improvement can go one better.

Then a handy effort when a close second behind Playa Del Carmen at Maryborough over 1690m in a NR up to 36 on March 30 at $15. With further improvement can go one better.

form.formComment: Last start 9th (Sr2) over 1690m at Maryborough beaten 35 m by Playa Del Carmen (2:07.00) in NR up to 36 on March 30 at $15. At his previous start broke in score up and was out of position at the start 9th (Fr5) over 2150m at this track beaten 35 m by Always Skye High (2:44.90) in NR up to 37 on March 18 at $12. Others better.

form.formComment: Last start 10th (Sr3) over 1690m at Maryborough, well beaten by Playa Del Carmen (2:07.00) in NR up to 36 on March 30 at $3.90. Before that, then managed to finish fourth over 2150m at this track last start. Manners are proving a problem but suspect he is good enough to win if he gets it right.
